implementation_agents.summary: Authored-wave schema and fail-closed lint coverage now include closure-agent skill enforcement, marker discipline, ownership checks, and prompt-section validation.
Typed planning-status and doctor/control projections still expose queue totals, blocker summaries, closure coverage, and skill-catalog health from one status model.
Repo guidance docs now describe the same authored-wave structure, closure-agent skill contract, and queue/status behavior enforced by the Rust CLI surfaces.

Matched the doctor status model, including queue totals, closure coverage, and skill-catalog health.
